# Pull Request

## What does this change?

<!-- One paragraph: what was the problem, what did you build, and why this approach -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] `ruff check src/speculae/` passes (no lint errors)
- [ ] New functionality has tests
- [ ] Bug fixes have a regression test that would have caught the bug
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Local-first principle respected (no new required network calls)

## Testing notes

<!-- How did you verify this works? What edge cases did you test? -->

## Screenshots (if UI change)

<!-- Before / after, or just after if it's a new feature -->
